description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that triggers on push to tags matching *.*.* and any branch. Run a build-windows job on a windows-2025 environment, checking out the repository with submodules and a full fetch depth. Install the Windows 10.0.26100 SDK and WDK using winget. Determine if the workflow is running for a tag and extract version information. Build the project using the build_all.ps1 script. Upload installers and unpacked build artifacts.
